channel.title: GitHub Bicep Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Bicep in GitHub

item.title: Azure/bicep
item.description: Bicep is a declarative language for describing and deploying Azure resources

item.title: Azure/Enterprise-Scale
item.description: The Enterprise-Scale architecture provides prescriptive guidance coupled with Azure best practices, and it follows design principles across the critical design areas for organizations to define their Azure architecture
